title: ACCESSING SUCCESS - 211info
text: RELIEF NURSERY ROBIN JAQUA CHILD AND FAMILY CENTER ACCESSING SUCCESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for individuals struggling with substance use or those in recovery. Services include screenings and referrals to treatment providers or community partners as needed. Collaborates with child welfare and local Treatment Court programs. Offers peer support for individuals in recovery, affected family members, and families involved in other Relief Nursery services. 850 S 42nd Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Families with children age 6 and younger who are enrolled in other Relief Nursery services Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm. Evening classes available. (541) 343-9706 114 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 343-9706 ext 114 Ray Brown [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene and Springfield SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Support Groups * At Risk Families Assessment for Substance Use Disorders * At Risk Families Drug Use Disorder Support Groups * At Risk Families Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RELIEF NURSERY OUTREACH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - THERAPEUTIC EARLY CHILDHOOD PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND FAMILY THERAPY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RELIEF NURSERY ROBIN JAQUA CHILD AND FAMILY CENTER
